title: Scientific Advisory Committee on Health Products for Women (SAC-HPW): Meeting Announcement - Canada.ca
content:
## Scientific Advisory Committee on Health Products for Women (SAC-HPW): Meeting Announcement
Ottawa,  Ontario April 26, 2019
The purpose  of this Notice is to announce an upcoming meeting of Health Canada's Scientific  Advisory Committee on Health Products for Women (SAC-HPW).
The advice  received from this meeting will be used to help inform the regulatory and  scientific review of medical devices that are used in women.

## Mandate  of the SAC-HPW
To provide  Health Canada with timely patient-centered, scientific, technical, medical and  clinical advice on current and emerging issues regarding women’s health and the  regulation of medical devices and drugs. The Committee will examine issues  across the product life cycle, from development to real-world use, with a focus  on patient perspectives and experiences. This includes providing advice to help  inform the regulatory review process, addressing specific questions on women’s  health related to the evidence used to support the safety, efficacy and quality  of drugs and medical devices, addressing questions on current and emerging  issues (pre- and post-market) and identifying areas where clarification is  needed with regard to policy, guidance and applicable regulatory requirements.
For more  details on the mandate of the SAC-HPW, please refer to the Draft Terms of Reference of the SAC-HPW.
Health Canada will present on each topic and pose questions  to the committee.
Upon  completion of the presentation and following discussion, the Committee will  deliberate before providing recommendations to Health Canada.
The following  topics will be discussed:
- Clinical  Evidence for Medical Devices;
- Lifecycle  Management of Medical Devices; and,
- Knowledge  Translation to Patients.
A more detailed agenda will be posted with this announcement.
